title: Xtra Drinks
description: A Food And Drink Mod Centered Around Fruit
body:
# XtraDrinks

***

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#a-minecraft-mod-made-with-java-for-forge)A Minecraft Mod made with Java for Forge

 

#### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#venture-into-a-new-world-with-xtradrinks-made-by-istrikeboomi-and-chauhansai)Venture into a new world with XtraDrinks, made by [IStrikeboomI](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI) and [ChauhanSai](https://github.com/ChauhanSai).

 

This mod adds new materials into the game with a new mechanic, dehydration. Dehydrate new fruits and blocks to make new foods and items. This mod adds 3 new sets of armor, each with their own effects. Explore new structures around the world. With XtraDrinks you can become the master liquidor

 

Recommended with use of [JEI(Just Enough Items)]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)) For Minecraft Java Version 1.16.5, **1.18.2, and 1.19**

 

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#check-out-the-bedrock-pack)Check out the [Bedrock Pack](https://chauhansaimc.wixsite.com/chauhan-sai-mc/post/xtradrinks-minecraft-addon-download)

***

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/60586926/175797251-577e1bbc-e0fa-45d3-a54c-a6edbefa63af.png)

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/60586926/175797260-c55934e1-223d-4b61-a341-a729a25dd0f9.png)

***

## [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#new-blocks)New Blocks:

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#dehydrator)Dehydrator

Dehydrates fruits and vegetables for better hunger saturation

 

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#liquad-dehydrator)Liquid Dehydrator

Converts Molten Fizzium and Molten Liquadium (Found in naturally generating wells) into Fizzium and Liquadium shards

 

## [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#new-items)New Items:

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#fizzium-set)Fizzium Set

*   Provides 20 armor points
*   Effects a set bonus of Speed II

 

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#liquadium-set)Liquadium Set

*   Provides 20 armor points
*   Effects a set bonus of Strength II

 

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#juicetanium-set)Juicetanium Set

Created by combining fizzium and liquadium ingots

*   Provides 27 armor points
*   Effects a set bonus of Speed III, Strength III, & Saturation

 

## [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#fruits)Fruits:

Can generate in sky farms

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#topical-fruits)Topical Fruits

Growable

*   Pineapples
*   Lemons
*   Limes

 

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#berries)Berries

Growable

*   Cranberries
*   Blueberries
*   Blackberries

 

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#pomegratate)Pomegranate

Growable

 

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#pines-oranges--coconuts)Pines, Oranges, & Coconuts

*   Pines: Can be found on spruce trees
*   Oranges: Can be found on forest trees
*   Coconuts: Can be found on jungle trees

 

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#dehydrated-vanilla-crops)Dehydrated Vanilla Crops

*   Dehydrated carrots, potatos, beetroots

 

### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#citric-acid)Citric Acid

*   Made from any citric fruit and can be used to make drinks

 

## [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#new-drinks)New Drinks:

*   Apple Juice
*   Apple Cider
*   Beet Juice
*   Carrot Juice
*   Carrot Smoothie
*   Chocolate Milk
*   Cinnamon Spice
*   Coconut Water
*   Cranapple
*   Cranlemon
*   Cranlime
*   Fizzium Brew
*   Fruit Punch
*   Grape Juice
*   Lemon Juice
*   Lime Juice
*   Potato Juice
*   Sour Juice
*   Tropical Punch
*   Juicetanium Brew
*   Liquadium Brew

***

## [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/XtraDrinks#greenman)Greenman

A Villager-like entity that spawns naturally with fruit filled inventories
